# Vivek Parmar — Software Developer Portfolio
> Vivek Parmar is a Software Developer at Techforce Infotech Pvt. Ltd., specializing in Java 17, Spring Boot, and React. This portfolio covers his professional experience, technical projects, and education.

## Who is Vivek Parmar?
Vivek Parmar is a backend-focused full-stack software engineer based in Ahmedabad, India, with 2 years of experience. He works at Techforce Infotech Pvt. Ltd. as a Software Developer (promoted from Associate Software Developer), building an enterprise US healthcare order and patient management platform that supports 100+ practices, agencies, manufacturers, and administrators. He holds a B.E. in Computer Engineering from Vishwakarma Government Engineering College, Ahmedabad (Gujarat Technological University).

## Core Technical Skills
- **Backend**: Java 17, Spring Boot, Spring Security, JWT, JPA/Hibernate, REST APIs, Microservices, Async Processing, Distributed Job Locking, WebSocket
- **Frontend**: React.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Redux Toolkit, HTML5, CSS3, Angular 17, PrimeNG
- **Databases**: MySQL, SQL
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS), GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CI/CD, Git, GitHub, SVN, Maven
- **AI**: Custom LLM integration for EHR document completeness checks
- **Quality & Tooling**: JUnit, Mockito, Postman, SonarQube
- **Integrations**: Stripe, ERP systems, email/SMS APIs, webhooks, Apache PDFBox, Apache POI

## Professional Experience
- **Software Developer** at Techforce Infotech Pvt. Ltd. (August 2024 – Present, promoted from Associate Software Developer): Designed, developed, and maintained 40+ REST APIs (Java 17, Spring Boot) for order, invoice, payment, notification, and document workflows on an enterprise US healthcare platform — 10,000+ orders and invoices handled across 100+ organizations. Built reusable React + TypeScript + Redux Toolkit components, implemented JWT authentication with role-based access control for secure patient data workflows, integrated Stripe, ERP systems, email/SMS providers, and webhooks, resolved production-critical issues across Dev/Stage/Prod, and deployed on AWS with Jenkins CI/CD.
- **Software Developer Intern** at Rays TechServ (February 2024 – May 2024): Frontend and backend feature development, debugging, and defect resolution following Agile, Git, and SDLC practices.

## Featured Projects
- [Healthcare Order Management Platform](https://vivekparmar.is-a.dev/#projects): Production system at Techforce Infotech — 40+ REST APIs handling 10,000+ orders and invoices for 100+ organizations, with Stripe payments, WebSocket notifications, custom LLM-powered EHR document completeness checks, and AWS deployment with GitHub Actions and Jenkins CI/CD. Built with Java 17, Spring Boot, React, Redux Toolkit, and MySQL.
- [Skillroom — Prompt Intelligence Engine](https://github.com/VivekParmar-18/skillroom): Open-source Claude Agent Skill (MIT licensed) that transforms brief prompts into expert-level prompts — intent classification across 13+ domains, automatic role assignment, and a transparent 0–100 quality scorecard.
- [Lab Automation Tool](https://vivekparmar.is-a.dev/#projects): Client project at Techforce Infotech — lab workflow management built with Angular 17, PrimeNG, MySQL, and REST APIs.
- [First Flight Travels](https://vivekparmar.is-a.dev/#projects): Personal project — a multi-page travel booking website front-end built with HTML5 and CSS3.

## Education
- B.E. — Computer Engineering, Vishwakarma Government Engineering College, Ahmedabad (Gujarat Technological University), 2020 – 2024

## Certifications
- Model Context Protocol: Advanced Topics — Anthropic (2026)
- Claude Code in Action — Anthropic (2026)
- Java Foundations Professional Certificate — JetBrains (2026)
- Building AI Agents: Advanced Techniques for Developers — LinkedIn Learning (2026)
- AWS Certified Developer – Associate (in progress)
